title: enneapogon scaber
intro: Enneapogon scaber, also known as the rough grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in various herbal remedies due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Enneapogon scaber is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health. In traditional herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
